name: Char-Pipe
description: Sa sirène hurlante annonce la mort. Il pulvérise du plasma recyclé en éventail. Les ennemis fuient ou fondent. Souvent les deux.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk flamethrower tank, armored vehicle spraying wide arc of blue-white plasma fire, welded scrap hull with scorched patches, sirens mounted on top, molten debris dripping, hellish orange glow, highly detailed, cinematic
